name: OpenClaw
notes: Self-hosted AI agent gateway across messaging channels.

name: ZeroClaw
notes: Lightweight edge-oriented agent runtime.

name: Claude Code
notes: Terminal-based agentic coding tool from Anthropic.

name: OpenCode
notes: Open-source coding agent.

name: Goose
notes: Extensible open-source AI agent with strong CLI workflow support.

name: Crush
notes: Terminal-native agentic coding experience.

name: Aider
notes: CLI-first multi-file code editing assistant.

name: OpenHands
notes: Autonomous coding agent with sandboxed workflow orientation.

name: Cline
notes: VS Code agentic coding assistant.

name: Continue
notes: IDE-native coding assistant with model flexibility.

name: Cursor
notes: Commercial editor-centered AI coding assistant.

name: Superwhisper
notes: Voice input and speech-to-text productivity layer for developers.

name: Onlook
notes: AI-first visual builder for React apps; a primary build surface rather than just an orchestration wrapper.

name: oh-my-openagent
notes: Open agent harness and orchestration wrapper.

name: oh-my-claudecode
notes: Teams-first multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code.

name: Aperant
notes: Autonomous multi-session AI coding system.

name: ralph-claude-code
notes: Autonomous Claude Code loop wrapper.

name: open-ralph-wiggum
notes: Loop controller for multiple coding agent backends.

name: SuperClaude Framework
notes: Configuration framework enhancing Claude Code workflows.

name: claudecodeui
notes: Web and mobile UI for remote coding agent sessions.

name: agentapi
notes: HTTP API abstraction for multiple coding agents.

name: Superset
notes: Desktop IDE / orchestration surface for parallel Claude Code, Codex, and related agents.

name: CCPM
notes: Project management skill system using GitHub Issues and worktrees for parallel agent execution.

name: Refly
notes: Open-source skills/workflow builder spanning Claude Code, Cursor, Codex and more.

name: Claude Squad
notes: Manager for multiple AI terminal agents including Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode.

name: Crystal
notes: Desktop manager for multiple Codex / Claude Code sessions across git worktrees.

name: AutoResearch
notes: Karpathy reference repo for autonomous research loops: agent modifies code, runs fixed-budget experiments, keeps or discards changes, and repeats. Important as a research-native workflow signal and origin point for multiple forks.

name: VibeSDK
notes: Platform SDK for building vibe-coding systems; more architecture/platform than direct end-user comparison target.

name: Claude Code Best Practice
notes: Best-practice and workflow guidance resource; useful as behavioral evidence, not primarily as a product choice.

name: Awesome Vibe Coding
notes: Curated list of vibe-coding references; useful for discovery, not canonical taxonomy.

name: OpenMemory
notes: Local persistent memory layer for LLM applications.

name: cipher
notes: Memory layer for coding agents via MCP.

name: serena
notes: Semantic retrieval and editing toolkit for coding agents.

name: Context7
notes: Up-to-date documentation and context layer for LLMs and AI code editors; discovery via vibe-coding topic, classified by clawfit as context infrastructure.

name: ouroboros
notes: Workflow or interaction loop utility to support human-agent productivity.

name: Kaku
notes: Terminal application built for AI coding; better understood as interface/productivity layer than core agent runtime.

name: Hermes Agent
notes: Adaptive open-source agent from NousResearch; designed to grow with the user over sessions. 40+ tool integrations, messaging platform support (Telegram, Slack, Discord), built-in cron scheduler.

name: obsidian-skills
notes: Agent skill pack for Obsidian: teaches agents to use Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas, and the Obsidian CLI. First-party skill pack from Obsidian CEO.

name: Shannon
notes: Autonomous AI pentester: reads source code, identifies attack surfaces, generates and executes exploits. Domain-specialized Level 1 agent for security workflows. High governance requirement.

name: Ghost Pepper
notes: Hold-to-talk local STT for macOS using Whisper; fully offline, no audio leaves device. Privacy-first alternative to Superwhisper for confidential environments.

name: Career-Ops
notes: AI-powered job search pipeline on Claude Code: offer evaluation, tailored PDF CVs, Playwright portal scraping, 14 skill modes.

name: claude-peers-mcp
notes: MCP server enabling ad-hoc peer messaging between Claude Code instances on the same machine via a local SQLite broker.

name: pi-generative-ui
notes: Reverse-engineered Claude.ai's show_widget tool rebuilt for the pi macOS agent; streams interactive HTML/SVG widgets into native WKWebView windows.

name: superpowers
notes: Agentic skills framework + software development methodology. Shell-first for maximum runtime compatibility. 145k stars — largest harness/SSOT repo in taxonomy. 'That works' framing targets reliability over novelty.

name: Archon
notes: Open-source harness builder for AI coding; generates deterministic and repeatable harness configurations. Harness-generator sub-type distinct from harness runtimes.

name: rowboat
notes: Open-source AI coworker with native (first-class) memory. 'Coworker' framing implies persistent task ownership across sessions. Memory is built-in, not an add-on MCP.

name: multica
notes: Open-source managed agents platform; 'turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress.' Team-oriented multi-agent management with task assignment and progress tracking.

name: Twill.ai
notes: YC S25 managed cloud agent service. Async delegation model: submit tasks, agents work in cloud, receive PRs as output. No local setup; fire-and-forget with PR output. First managed cloud agent service in taxonomy.

name: Strix
notes: Open-source autonomous AI security testing platform. Teams of agents run code dynamically, find vulnerabilities, and validate through PoC execution — not static analysis. CI/CD integration via GitHub Actions. Distinct from Shannon: developer self-service shift-left security testing vs. expert pentester workflow. 23k+ stars.

name: GBrain
notes: MIT-licensed personal knowledge base for agents by YC CEO Garry Tan. Markdown+PGLite (Postgres) backend; agents read before each response, write back after. Works natively with OpenClaw and Hermes Agent. CLI via bun. MCP support incoming. Local-first markdown+git as source of truth — human-inspectable, diffable, privacy-friendly.

name: DureClaw
notes: Cross-machine multi-agent orchestration. Claude Code orchestrator + Phoenix WebSocket server + oah-agent workers. Heterogeneous AI backends (claude/opencode/gemini/aider). MCP plugin via @dureclaw/mcp. Mac/Linux/Windows/Raspberry Pi. By hongsw.

name: AnythingLLM
notes: Self-hosted all-in-one AI productivity platform. Document chat (RAG), no-code agent builder, MCP compatible, 40+ LLM providers, multi-user with permissions. Docker or desktop app.

name: DeepTutor
notes: Agent-native personalized learning platform by HKUDS. 5 modes (Chat, Deep Solve, Quiz, Deep Research, Math Animator). RAG-based Knowledge Hub. Personal TutorBots with independent memory. Agent-Native CLI. Port 8001/3782.

name: korean-law-mcp
notes: Korean law MCP server. 39 APIs consolidated into 14 tools (v3.0). 82% context cost reduction from v2. 17 legal domains. HWPX/HWP/PDF/XLSX/DOCX document processing. Hosted endpoint available.

name: ATLAS
notes: Adaptive Test-time Learning. 74.6% LiveCodeBench pass@1 with frozen Qwen3-14B. ~$0.004/task (electricity only). 3-stage pipeline: PlanSearch + Geometric Lens + self-verify repair. Fully local, no API calls. Min 16GB GPU VRAM.

name: pi-mono
notes: 7-package monorepo: pi-ai (multi-provider LLM API), pi-agent-core (runtime), pi-coding-agent (CLI), pi-tui (terminal UI), pi-web-ui (chat components), pi-mom (Slack bot), pi-pods (vLLM GPU pods). Parent of pi-generative-ui plugin ecosystem.

name: Polysona
notes: 10 psychology frameworks to extract multi-persona profiles. 5-agent pipeline: Profiler→Trendsetter→Content-Writer→Virtual-Follower→Admin. Portable persona files (persona.md, nuance.md). Cross-agent: Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode.

name: hermes-paperclip-adapter
notes: Adapter for running Hermes Agent as managed employee in Paperclip platform. 8 inference providers, 30+ native tools, 80+ loadable skills. MCP integration. Default model: claude-sonnet-4.
